description: Shared Renovate preset for the Asteby + Metacore ecosystem. Singularity model: every update auto-merges, regardless of severity, manager or package. The platform team publishes, every consumer app inherits — automatically, in cascade. Updates are scheduled off-peak (nights + weekends, America/Mexico_City) with low PR limits so the single shared self-hosted CI runner is never flooded and human deploys win the queue during work hours. updateNotScheduled:false + rebaseWhen:conflicted keep Renovate fully quiet during the day — it no longer rebases open PRs when main advances (that flooded the runner on every human merge); it only rebases on a real conflict, off-peak.

packageRules.description: Universal singularity — auto-merge EVERY update type for EVERY package across npm, gomod, dockerfile, github-actions and lockfiles.
Metacore platform (npm) grouped into one cascade PR.
React + TanStack + Radix grouped to land together (avoid peerDep clashes).
